ExportQuery:
select
 ProductID as productId
,PlanID as planId
,ProductLine as productLine
,named_struct('groupId',PlanGroupID,'groupName',PlanGroupName,'subGroup',PlanSubGroup,'type',PlanType,'subType',PlanSubType) as plan
,date_format(StartDate,'MM/dd/yyyy') as startDate
,date_format(EndDate,'MM/dd/yyyy') as endDate
,cast(ECDSIndicator as int) as ECDSIndicator
,AlphaPrefix as alphaPrefix
,ProductType as produtType
,PlanMarketingName as planMarketingName
,MarketCoverage as marketCoverage
,NCQASubmissionID as NCQASubmissionId
,MetalLevel as metalLevel
,IssuerID as issuerId
FROM QueryResult where FileLayoutDescription = 'ACAProduct'
